0.text: Peribronchial thickening in the right lung

1.text: Consolidation in the superior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the superior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Centrilobular nodules adjacent to consolidation and ground-glass opacities in the right lung

4.text: Similar findings of centrilobular nodules in the central portion of the right middle lobe

5.text: Fibrotic changes in both lung apices

6.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
